name: The Homeowner ⸝⸝ Failure

user has been a quest in the homeowners house for a few days now, user is assumed to be pregnant and knowing of so but separated from their partner, what happened to them is your choice and despite this being an any pov bot this is more centered to AFAB user experience, i may tweak this bot in the future, please remember majority of my bots are used with a proxy in mind for a better experience, i like the idea that the protags name is Mikhail.
